body:
🔴 **Breaking** — Four `TextResponseFormat*` types were renamed but are **not documented in the CHANGELOG**.

The 2.0.0 GA release exported these four types:
- `TextResponseFormatConfiguration`
- `TextResponseFormatConfigurationUnion`
- `TextResponseFormatConfigurationResponseFormatText`
- `TextResponseFormatConfigurationResponseFormatJsonObject`

This PR replaces them with:
- `TextResponseFormat` (line 143)
- `TextResponseFormatUnion` (line 144)
- `TextResponseFormatText` (line 147)
- `TextResponseFormatJsonObject` (line 148)

Any code that imported or explicitly typed variables with the old names will fail to compile.

**Fix:** Add entries under `### Breaking Changes` in `CHANGELOG.md` for each of these four renames, e.g.  
`- Rename \`TextResponseFormatConfiguration\` to \`TextResponseFormat\` (and the three related types).`

🔴 **Breaking** — `BetaEvaluatorsListLatestVersionsOptionalParams` was removed from the public API and replaced with `BetaEvaluatorsListOptionalParams`, but this rename is **not documented in the CHANGELOG**.

The 2.0.0 GA release exported `BetaEvaluatorsListLatestVersionsOptionalParams` from `src/index.ts` (via this file). Any TypeScript consumer who typed options objects as `BetaEvaluatorsListLatestVersionsOptionalParams` will get a compile error.

**Fix:** Add a breaking change entry to `CHANGELOG.md`:  
`- Rename \`BetaEvaluatorsListLatestVersionsOptionalParams\` to \`BetaEvaluatorsListOptionalParams\`.`

🟡 **Medium — Incomplete breaking-changes list**

The CHANGELOG records only two breaking changes for 2.1.0:
- `container_protocol_versions` required → optional
- `code_type` required → optional

At least five additional breaking changes are present in this PR (four `TextResponseFormat*` type renames and one `BetaEvaluatorsListLatestVersionsOptionalParams` rename — see inline comments on the source files).

All breaking changes that affect public types exported from `src/index.ts` must be documented here so consumers can migrate.

**Fix:** Expand the `### Breaking Changes` section with the missing entries before merging.

🟡 **Medium — Breaking changes in a minor version bump**

This PR bumps the version from `2.0.0` (GA) to `2.1.0`, yet the CHANGELOG lists multiple breaking changes. Per [semver](https://semver.org/) and the [Azure SDK breaking-changes policy](https://azure.github.io/azure-sdk/general_introduction.html), a minor version increment signals backward-compatible additions only. Breaking changes require a **major** version bump (i.e. `3.0.0`).

**Fix:** Either:
1. Bump to `3.0.0` (and align `KnownApiVersions` if needed), or
2. Remove all breaking changes from this release and ship them in a separate major-version release.

🟡 **Medium — `BetaOperations` interface gains required properties (breaking for implementors)**

In the 2.0.0 GA release, `BetaOperations` had 6 properties (`schedules`, `redTeams`, `memoryStores`, `insights`, `evaluators`, `evaluationTaxonomies`). This PR adds three new required properties: `agents`, `skills`, and `toolboxes`.

Adding required properties to a public interface is a source-breaking change for any TypeScript consumer who:
- Implemented `BetaOperations` directly (e.g., in mocks or fakes), or
- Used an object literal explicitly typed as `BetaOperations`.

This change should be recorded in the CHANGELOG and, consistent with the version-bump concern, indicates a major version is warranted.

This PR introduces several breaking changes to `@azure/ai-projects` against the 2.0.0 GA baseline. **5 findings** (2 critical, 3 medium):

| # | Severity | Category | Summary |
|---|----------|----------|---------|
| 1 | 🔴 Critical | Breaking / undocumented | 4 `TextResponseFormat*` types renamed (not in CHANGELOG) |
| 2 | 🔴 Critical | Breaking / undocumented | `BetaEvaluatorsListLatestVersionsOptionalParams` removed (not in CHANGELOG) |
| 3 | 🟡 Medium | CHANGELOG completeness | Breaking-changes section is missing the 5 items above |
| 4 | 🟡 Medium | Versioning | Minor version bump (2.0.0 → 2.1.0) with confirmed breaking changes — semver requires 3.0.0 |
| 5 | 🟡 Medium | Breaking / interface shape | `BetaOperations` gains 3 required properties — breaks implementors/mocks |

The new features (`beta.agents`, `beta.skills`, `beta.toolboxes`, new model types, `BetaAgentsOperations`, `BetaSkillsOperations`, `BetaToolboxesOperations`) are all additive and well-structured.

<details>
<summary>📊 Structured Report</summary>

```json
{"agent":"archie","pr":37993,"summary":"issues_found","findings":[{"file":"sdk/ai/ai-projects/src/models/index.ts","line":143,"severity":"critical","category":"breaking_change","description":"4 TextResponseFormat* types renamed without CHANGELOG entry: TextResponseFormatConfiguration→TextResponseFormat, TextResponseFormatConfigurationUnion→TextResponseFormatUnion, TextResponseFormatConfigurationResponseFormatText→TextResponseFormatText, TextResponseFormatConfigurationResponseFormatJsonObject→TextResponseFormatJsonObject"},{"file":"sdk/ai/ai-projects/src/api/beta/evaluators/index.ts","line":18,"severity":"critical","category":"breaking_change","description":"BetaEvaluatorsListLatestVersionsOptionalParams removed and replaced with BetaEvaluatorsListOptionalParams without CHANGELOG entry"},{"file":"sdk/ai/ai-projects/CHANGELOG.md","line":5,"severity":"medium","category":"documentation","description":"Breaking-changes section is incomplete; missing 5 breaking changes"},{"file":"sdk/ai/ai-projects/package.json","line":3,"severity":"medium","category":"versioning","description":"Minor version bump 2.0.0→2.1.0 contains breaking changes; semver requires major bump to 3.0.0"},{"file":"sdk/ai/ai-projects/src/classic/beta/index.ts","line":28,"severity":"medium","category":"breaking_change","description":"BetaOperations interface gains 3 new required properties (agents, skills, toolboxes), breaking any code that implements or explicitly assigns the interface"}]}
```

</details>
